detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TradableErc20.createLiquidity() (DYDZ.sol#825-887):
	External calls:
	- pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (DYDZ.sol#829-835)
	- _uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),initialLiquidity,0,0,msg.sender,block.timestamp) (DYDZ.sol#859-873)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),initialLiquidity,0,0,msg.sender,block.timestamp) (DYDZ.sol#859-873)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- uniswapPair = pair (DYDZ.sol#877)
	TradableErc20.uniswapPair (DYDZ.sol#745) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TradableErc20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DYDZ.sol#891-971)
	- TradableErc20.createLiquidity() (DYDZ.sol#825-887)
	- TradableErc20.uniswapPair (DYDZ.sol#745)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [TradableErc20.createLiquidity()](DYDZ.sol#L825-L887):
	External calls:
	- [pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](DYDZ.sol#L829-L835)
	- [_uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),initialLiquidity,0,0,msg.sender,block.timestamp)](DYDZ.sol#L859-L873)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [_uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),initialLiquidity,0,0,msg.sender,block.timestamp)](DYDZ.sol#L859-L873)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [uniswapPair = pair](DYDZ.sol#L877)
	[TradableErc20.uniswapPair](DYDZ.sol#L745) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TradableErc20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DYDZ.sol#L891-L971)
	- [TradableErc20.createLiquidity()](DYDZ.sol#L825-L887)
	- [TradableErc20.uniswapPair](DYDZ.sol#L745)

detectors.description:
MaxWalletDynamic.getMaxWallet() (DYDZ.sol#693-703) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- incrementCount = (block.timestamp - startTime) / (maxBuyIncrementMinutesTimer * 60) (DYDZ.sol#695-697)
	- startMaxWallet + maxBuyIncrementValue * incrementCount (DYDZ.sol#701)
detectors.markdown:
[MaxWalletDynamic.getMaxWallet()](DYDZ.sol#L693-L703) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [incrementCount = (block.timestamp - startTime) / (maxBuyIncrementMinutesTimer * 60)](DYDZ.sol#L695-L697)
	- [startMaxWallet + maxBuyIncrementValue * incrementCount](DYDZ.sol#L701)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TradableErc20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DYDZ.sol#891-971):
	External calls:
	- _swapTokensForEthOnTransfer(amount,_balances[address(this)],_uniswapV2Router) (DYDZ.sol#953-961)
		- _uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETH(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DYDZ.sol#301-313)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(from,to,amount) (DYDZ.sol#969)
		- _balances[from] = senderBalance - amount (DYDZ.sol#517)
		- _balances[to] += amount (DYDZ.sol#521)
	ERC20._balances (DYDZ.sol#429) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TradableErc20._arrangeFee(address,uint256,uint256) (DYDZ.sol#1097-1153)
	- TradableErc20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DYDZ.sol#891-971)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DYDZ.sol#501-525)
	- TradableErc20.createLiquidity() (DYDZ.sol#825-887)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [TradableErc20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DYDZ.sol#L891-L971):
	External calls:
	- [_swapTokensForEthOnTransfer(amount,_balances[address(this)],_uniswapV2Router)](DYDZ.sol#L953-L961)
		- [_uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETH(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](DYDZ.sol#L301-L313)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [super._transfer(from,to,amount)](DYDZ.sol#L969)
		- [_balances[from] = senderBalance - amount](DYDZ.sol#L517)
		- [_balances[to] += amount](DYDZ.sol#L521)
	[ERC20._balances](DYDZ.sol#L429) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TradableErc20._arrangeFee(address,uint256,uint256)](DYDZ.sol#L1097-L1153)
	- [TradableErc20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DYDZ.sol#L891-L971)
	- [ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DYDZ.sol#L501-L525)
	- [TradableErc20.createLiquidity()](DYDZ.sol#L825-L887)
